title: IndexingJob
description: Envelope pushed by tenant-api onto the Redis Stream indexing:{tenant_id}. The 'data' field of each stream entry contains a JSON-serialised instance of this schema.

job_id.description: UUIDv4 generated by tenant-api when the indexing job is enqueued.

tenant_id.description: UUID of the tenant that owns this document.

document_id.description: UUID of the knowledge_base_documents row to be indexed.

storage_uri.description: S3-style URI of the raw document in object storage. Example: s3://kb-documents/{tenant_id}/{document_id}.pdf

source_type.description: Document format — drives the loader and chunking strategy in rag-indexer.

name.description: Human-readable filename (e.g. FAQ.pdf) for logging purposes.

embedder.description: Embedder to use for this document. Defaults to the platform default (sbert).

enqueued_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which tenant-api enqueued this job.
